globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 crisp side-view pixel art; binary alpha; top-left light; hard clusters; no antialiasing or gradients.
globalNegativePrompt: blur, partial alpha, soft glow, noise dithering, watermark, logo, copied game art, text, frame labels
globalRequirements: Export exact manifest dimensions and source rectangles.
Keep every standalone sprite outlined and readable on light and dark fields.
Keep scene activation honest as runtime-preloaded until a runtime owner wires the IDs.

briefs.subject: entities player character v1 wave04 body
briefs.prompt: Production Wave 04 pixel-art asset for entities player character v1 wave04 body; readable at native scale and coherent with the generated adventurer source board.
requirements: Export exactly 256x32 RGBA with binary alpha.
Runtime ID target: entities/player/character_v1_wave04/body; current activation is preload-only.
Use only yjse-pixel-v1 colors and hard nearest-neighbor clusters.
Preserve 16 declared frame rectangles and per-frame origins.
All five character layers share the same 16x32 registration, frame order, origin, and baseline.
